_template_note: Copy to catalog_ingestion_manifest.json next to this file. List JSON sources under the three keys below. Each value is either a path string or an object {"path": "..."}. Paths are relative to the manifest file unless you pass --base-dir to scripts/run_catalog_ingestion.py. Source files must follow the seed layout: "switches" is an object mapping subtype (e.g. linear, tactile) to an array of items; "plates", "foams", and "layouts" are arrays. Items use id, name, optional subtype, sourceUrl, metadata, tags, aliases. You may delete this _template_note key after copying.
